hooks.command: jq -r 'select((.tool_input.file_path // "") | endswith("messages/en.json")) | {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: "messages/en.json was just edited — sync the new or changed keys into messages/{fr,es,pt,zh,ar}.json using the i18n-sync skill (.claude/skills/i18n-sync/SKILL.md), keeping idiomatic locale-natural phrasing per the skill register rules (FR=vous, ES=tú, PT=European pt with tu/você, ZH=Mandarin Simplified peer-direct 你, AR=Modern Standard with RTL handled by src/i18n/seo.ts)."}}'

jq -r 'select((.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("content/articles/en/.+\\.mdx$")) | {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: "An English article under content/articles/en/ was just created or modified — mirror it into content/articles/{fr,es,pt,zh,ar}/ using the article-translate skill (.claude/skills/article-translate/SKILL.md). Preserve the slug verbatim across locales (hreflang depends on it). Translate frontmatter title/description/heroAlt/keywords; keep citations[] verbatim; preserve all MDX components and inline citation markers."}}'

if ! out=$(.claude/scripts/article-i18n-completeness.sh 2>&1); then jq -nc --arg msg "$out" '{decision:"block", reason:("Cannot end turn: " + $msg + "\nRun the article-translate skill (.claude/skills/article-translate/SKILL.md) to mirror missing locales before stopping.")}'; fi
